nasb.text: For there is no omen against Jacob, Nor is there any divination against Israel; At the proper time it shall be said to Jacob And to Israel, what God has done!

esv.text: For there is no enchantment against Jacob, no divination against Israel; now it shall be said of Jacob and Israel, ‘What has God wrought!’

cnv.text: 在雅各中沒有觀兆的， 在以色列中也沒有占卜； 到了適當的時候，必有話對雅各和以色列說： ‘　神為他們行了何等的大事！’

ccb.text: 没有邪术能害雅各， 没有咒语可伤以色列。 时候一到，人们必谈论雅各， 谈论以色列，说，‘看啊， 上帝的作为何等伟大！’
